source.document: PPDA (Evaluation) Regulations 2014 / World Bank SBD / PPDA (Rules and Methods) Regulations 2014
source.disclaimer: Criteria and weights are ILLUSTRATIVE -- actual criteria must match those stated in the specific bidding documents. No criteria may be added or modified during evaluation (PPDA Evaluation Regulations 2014, Regulation 7(2)).

criteria.sub_criteria: Legal capacity, not bankrupt, tax compliance, not suspended, no conflict of interest
Bid security (correct form and amount), bid format, authorisation and signature, bid validity, required documents
Conformity with bidding document terms, no material deviation
Bid adheres to technical specifications and standards
Proposed work plan and completion schedule are adequate
Work methods including safety precautions and measures are adequate
Documents submitted including drawings, charts, calculations are adequate
Methods for handling materials and schedules of materials and equipment are suitable
Unit price prevails over total; subtotals prevail over total; words prevail over figures (with arithmetic exception)
After corrections, discounts, missing item adjustments, deviation adjustments, currency conversion, preference margin

stages.award_basis: Lowest evaluated price among technically responsive bids

criteria.sub_criteria: Experience on similar contracts, key personnel, equipment, financial capacity, current workload

works_evaluation.pass_threshold: N/A (pass/fail for technical compliance method -- no scoring threshold)
works_evaluation.financial_weight: Lowest evaluated price for ICB/NCB/ODB (price-only after technical pass). QCBS uses weighted scoring (Regulations 22-31).
works_evaluation.evaluation_timeline_works: 40 working days from date of bid opening (Regulation 5(1)(b))

technical_criteria.sub_criteria: Similar contracts completed in last 5 years
Project Manager, RE, Site Engineer qualifications and experience

qcbs_evaluation.financial_weight: QCBS uses weighted scoring (technical:financial typically 80:20 or 70:30 -- as stated in bidding documents)
qcbs_evaluation.notes: QCBS is NOT the standard method for works under PPDA. It applies only where specified (design-build, IT). For standard works contracts, use technical compliance method.
